_comment: Offline/rate-limit fallback. Same shape the GitHub normalizer expects. Regenerate occasionally, or leave as a curated 'greatest hits' list.

projects.name: rxrefactor
projects.description: AI medical-benefit drug policy tracker: hybrid exact-match + RAG semantic search over 6,100+ policy fragments across 5 insurers, <500ms end-to-end.

projects.name: assessment-ai
projects.description: LLM-powered student assessment platform: Django REST + dual-LLM pipeline with fallback routing, SHA-256/n-gram answer caching, per-student memory. Deployed on Cloud Run.

projects.name: face-recognition-pipeline
projects.description: FaceNet inference across IaaS, serverless, and edge: custom EC2 autoscaler (scales to 0 in 0.24s), Lambda variant, and Greengrass edge split cutting latency 57%.
